title: Generate a concise eBay title for [Brand] [Product Type] within 80 characters, including key features to fill into below listing.
description: Write a detailed eBay description using short paragraphs and bullet points. Highlight key features, benefits, and provide specific details about materials, craftsmanship, and technical specifications.
instructions: Use the provided Brand, Product Type, and Style number to search for product details and complete the eBay product listing as per the below requirements:
Find the Mandatory and Optional product information listed under 'Mandatory Fields' and 'Optional Fields'.

IMPORTANT: You MUST use the EXACT field names as provided, including both English and Italian parts. Every field name should be in the format: 'English Name (Italian Name)'. Do not omit or change any part of the field names.
If any fields have no information available on the internet, or you cannot find it, use 'N/A' as the value.
Provide specific price ranges based on current market data when possible.
Include detailed information about the watch movement, complications, and any special features.
Fill in as many optional fields as possible, especially technical specifications.
Provide detailed information about materials used and manufacturing processes.
The tone should be professional and follow a minimalist style.
Ensure all field names in your response follow the 'English (Italian)' format, even if you're only able to provide information for the English part.
Instructions for the Title:
- Brand Name: Include the brand for recognition (e.g., 'Rolex').
- Product Type: Clearly state what the item is (e.g., 'Men's Automatic Watch').
- Key Features: Include important features such as model name, material, or complications (e.g., 'Submariner', 'Stainless Steel', 'Chronograph').
- Reference Number: If possible, include the reference number for precise identification.
Examples of Titles:
- 'Rolex Submariner Men's Automatic Watch Stainless Steel Black Dial 116610LN'
- 'Omega Speedmaster Professional Moonwatch Chronograph 311.30.42.30.01.005'
- 'Cartier Tank Solo Large Model Quartz Steel Silver Dial W5200014'
- 'Patek Philippe Nautilus Blue Dial Stainless Steel 5711/1A-010'
- 'Audemars Piguet Royal Oak Selfwinding 41mm 15400ST.OO.1220ST.01'
Instructions for the Description:
1. Catchy Introduction: Start with a brief, engaging statement that highlights the watch's key features or heritage.
2. Unique Selling Point: Explain what makes this watch stand out from similar models.
3. Key Features and Benefits: Focus on the most important features (movement, complications, materials) and explain their significance.
4. Technical Specifications: Provide detailed information about the movement, case dimensions, water resistance, and other technical aspects.
5. Materials and Craftsmanship: Describe the materials used in different parts of the watch and any special manufacturing processes.
6. Dial and Hands: Detail the dial design, markers, and hand styles.
7. Bracelet/Strap: Describe the bracelet or strap, including material, clasp type, and any special features.
8. Brand Heritage: Briefly mention the brand's history or significance of the particular model.
9. Condition and Authenticity: For pre-owned watches, describe the condition in detail. For new watches, emphasize authenticity.
10. Warranty and Box/Papers: Mention any remaining warranty and whether original box and papers are included.
11. Care Instructions: Provide basic guidance on how to maintain the watch.
12. Call to Action: Encourage the buyer to make a purchase, highlighting any limited availability or special offers.
optional_fields: Payment Options and Offers (Regole di pagamento)
Maximum Wrist Circumference (Circonferenza massima del polso)
